component.name: PiLauncher
component.summary: 专为手柄设计的 Minecraft 启动器

description.p: PiLauncher 是一款为游戏手柄和掌机量身定制的 Minecraft 启动器。它拥有为主机式体验优化的全屏用户界面，让你可以轻松地使用手柄管理、配置和运行你的 Minecraft 游戏实例。

PiLauncher is a Minecraft launcher tailored for gamepads and handheld consoles. It features a full-screen, console-like user interface optimized for controller inputs, allowing you to easily manage and launch your Minecraft instances.

ul.li: 完全支持手柄操作，提供沉浸式大屏体验。
Full gamepad support for an immersive large-screen experience.
自动识别和配置手柄相关模组。
Automatic detection and configuration of gamepad-related mods.
极简且现代化的实例和模组管理。
Minimalist and modern instance and mod management.
[新功能] 支持记录上次选择的游戏实例，启动应用后自动定位。
[新功能] 重构实例选择弹窗，增加搜索过滤功能（支持标题、加载器、MC版本）。
[新功能] 针对 Steam Deck 优化了权限配置，支持读写 SD 卡及完整的 Steam 目录。
[优化] 打开实例选择弹窗时自动滚动并聚焦到当前选中的实例。
[优化] 完善了中英文翻译及相关提示信息。
[New] Added persistence for the last selected game instance.
[New] Refactored Instance Selection Modal with real-time search and filtering (by name, loader, or version).
[New] Optimized Flatpak permissions for Steam Deck, supporting SD card access and full Steam folder read/write.
[Optimization] Improved UX in selection modal with auto-scroll and focus transitions.
[Optimization] Updated localization and various UI hints in multiple languages.
